file_insights.old_purpose: Storage resilience JSONL WAL + checksum implementation results
file_insights.new_purpose: ASCII screenshot documentation for bop ui TUI (spec 029)
content_sections: Summary with implementation stats (13 source files, 15 tests, 7 phases/20 subtasks)
5 ASCII screenshot sections with visual demos and feature descriptions
Keybinding reference (Normal mode: h/l cols, j/k cards, Shift+H/L move, / filter)
Context-sensitive footer documentation (changes per overlay mode)
Technical details on newline-gated log streaming, progress bar rendering, collapsed column glyphs
file_insights.size_change: expanded from ~400 lines to ~450 lines (truncated in diff)
file_insights.documentation_quality: production-grade with visual examples, keyboard bindings, and interaction patterns

patterns_discovered.pattern: ASCII art TUI documentation via code blocks
patterns_discovered.context: Terminal UI projects need visual reference
patterns_discovered.implementation: Box-drawing Unicode chars (├─┌┘│), glyphs (▸●◉○✓✗⚙~), progress bars (█░), formatted text
patterns_discovered.benefit: Users can understand layout before running the tool

patterns_discovered.context: Normal mode vs overlay modes (detail, logs, filter, actions)
patterns_discovered.implementation: Footer shows different keybindings per mode; overlays replace body zone or appear as right-side panel
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents key collision confusion; users see only relevant actions

patterns_discovered.implementation: Collapsed to 3-character divider (glyph + vertical bars) when empty
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maximizes horizontal space for columns with content

patterns_discovered.context: Multiple concurrent views (detail, logs, filter, action menu)
patterns_discovered.implementation: Right-side panel (detail 50% width) or full-height overlay (logs), action popup centered with Clear
patterns_discovered.benefit: Follows lazygit/mc patterns; inspectable without losing kanban context

patterns_discovered.pattern: Two-line card entries for running tasks
patterns_discovered.context: Showing progress within list view without expanding height
patterns_discovered.implementation: Title line + progress bar line (██░░ NN%); providers shown inline
patterns_discovered.benefit: Compact density with visual feedback on progress

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Newline-gated log streaming is critical for ANSI correctness
gotchas_discovered.risk: Partial lines from ANSI sequences cause visual flicker and cursor position errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Only emit complete lines (ending in \n); buffer incomplete lines until newline arrives
gotchas_discovered.scope: Log tail overlay, any streaming output view

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Footer keybindings must change per mode
gotchas_discovered.risk: Users attempt to use Normal mode keys (e.g., j/k) inside overlay, nothing happens
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Explicitly document in footer which keys are active; handle Esc for mode exit universally

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Collapsed column glyphs must match state semantics
gotchas_discovered.risk: Wrong glyph (e.g., ✓ for RUNNING instead of ⚙) confuses user about what column is collapsed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: State ↔ glyph mapping: PENDING(·), RUNNING(⚙), DONE(✓), FAILED(✗), MERGED(~)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Progress bar rendering requires exact width calculation
gotchas_discovered.risk: Overflow breaks layout if bar width exceeds available space
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Reserve fixed width for percentage (e.g., 3 chars), cap filled chars to (width - 2)
gotchas_discovered.scope: Progress bars in running cards and detail overlay

deliverables_completed: Normal kanban view with horizontal columns, card count labels, WIP limit, collapsed glyphs
Collapsed empty columns section showing 3-char divider behavior
Detail overlay with card metadata, progress bar, AC plan phase/subtask tree (when applicable)
Log tail overlay with newline-gated streaming, FOLLOW toggle, clear and scroll modes
Filter mode section (partially shown in truncated diff; full content not visible)
approach_outcome.test_coverage: 15 insta snapshot tests across all views

recommendations.recommendation: Add interaction flow diagram showing mode transitions (Normal → Detail/Logs/Filter/Actions → Normal)
recommendations.rationale: Users new to the TUI benefit from visual state machine showing how to navigate between modes

recommendations.recommendation: Add stress test for log streaming with 10k+ lines; measure newline-gated buffer performance
recommendations.rationale: High-volume logs could reveal latency or memory issues; verify streaming doesn't block UI refresh

recommendations.recommendation: Document Unicode glyph usage (▸●◉○✓✗⚙~) with fallback ASCII equivalents for terminal limitations
recommendations.rationale: Some terminals or fonts may not render box-drawing chars correctly; fallback ensures usability

recommendations.recommendation: Add keybinding cheat sheet table in docs/ with sections per mode (Normal, Detail, Logs, Filter, Actions)
recommendations.rationale: Single reference page improves discoverability over embedded footer hints

recommendations.recommendation: Verify Shift+H/L card movement (fs::rename between columns) correctly updates card.jobcard/meta.json and JSONL event log
recommendations.rationale: State machine atomicity is critical; card must not be duplicated or lost during move

recommendations.recommendation: Consider `Tab` multi-select with bulk actions (yazi pattern) for batch state transitions (e.g., retry all failed)
recommendations.rationale: Already planned in spec 029 architecture notes; implement if time permits
